full_text:
Xie Xiong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Xiong. Offered his services to Zhuge Liang against Wang Shuang but was cut down. Xie Xiong is a fictional character. Xie Xiong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
